qa_pairs.question: How do you initiate a file transfer in the Globus File Manager?
qa_pairs.answer: After selecting the desired collections and highlighting the files or directories you want to transfer by single-clicking or control-clicking multiple items, click on one of the large blue buttons with white arrowheads to initiate the transfer.

qa_pairs.question: How can a user select multiple files or directories for a transfer in Globus?
qa_pairs.answer: To highlight multiple files or directories for transfer in Globus, a user should single-click on the first item and then control-click on any additional items they wish to include.

qa_pairs.question: How can you monitor the status of an ongoing or completed file transfer in Globus?
qa_pairs.answer: You can monitor in-progress transfers and view details of completed transfers by clicking on the 'Activity' button located on the left side of the Globus portal.
